phases.1-ground-truth: done (protected-registry.json, 54 endpoints, 15 models; re-frozen 2026-07-21 after the owner-authorized maintenance pass)
phases.maintenance-pass: done 2026-07-21, OUTSIDE admin scope by owner order: reminder delivery worker, webhook hardening, free manual sends billing fix, consistency cleanup. Gate: 27 suites 0 failed. Commit 54086c6.
phases.4-registry-schema: done 2026-07-21 (admin-registry.json FROZEN: 20 resources, 57 endpoints; migration 20260721101459_admin_surface_additive applied, 27 suites green)
phases.6-build-waves: done 2026-07-21: wave 2 (12 read resources, 7c29c86), wave 3 (4 action resources + protected-path event instrumentation). Gate: 47 suites, 636 tests, 0 failed.
phases.7-wire-prune: done 2026-07-21: 14 screens wired to the live API via the generated typed client; lib/fixtures deleted (nothing referenced it). Dashboard commits bd7eed7, cfe342d.
phases.8-triple-smoke: done 2026-07-21: (1) admin contracts 47 suites/636 tests green incl. cross-rejection; (2) regression = same suite, live app endpoints unchanged; (3) rendered pass: 13 routes headless, zero console errors, zero placeholder literals, live seeded data visible on every WIRE surface. Orchestrator additionally verified security refusals and action semantics against the running API.

deviations.what: No separate registry-generated regression suite. The repo's authoritative per-suite isolated gate (test/run-isolated.sh, 27 suites covering every live endpoint behaviorally) serves as the regression baseline and wave gate.
deviations.why: The suite is strictly stronger than shape-only generated tests, the protected registry was re-frozen against a verified git diff, and the owner has hit spend limits twice; duplicating 54 endpoint tests is cost without marginal safety.
deviations.risk: If the registry misrecords a shape, an admin DTO could be designed against the wrong shape; mitigated because admin DTOs are new (never reused) and wiring smoke uses live responses.

verified.securityRefusals: reset-test on non-test business 403; OTP reveal on non-test business 404 (and the refused attempt is itself audit-logged); support role blocked from grant-credits 403
verified.actions: grant credits 201; suspend/unsuspend 201 with 422 on repeat; enterprise bands 3 moves ceiling N40M -> N100M exactly (base + 3 x N20M); bands on non-enterprise 422
verified.audit: every action wrote a human-readable audit row with actor identity

followUps: suspension-enforcement: blocking new debts for suspended businesses is a protected-surface change to debts.service, needs owner authorization
billing fee derivation: store-fee/net columns ship as honest nulls until the owner rules how store fees are derived per transaction source
reset-test refusal returns 403 per the frozen registry; owner may prefer 422 (one line)
